raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I received an automated text message from the credit card company for the Best Buy Credit Card about a purchase attempting to be made. There were XXXX purchases made, XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX before I got alerted, totaling over XXXX dollars. I immediately denied that purchase that was attempting to be made on XX/XX/XXXX and then reported the card as lost/stolen. I was told they would be making a dispute claim, but after a few weeks of no communication I called again and it turns out no one actually created the claim. I then redid the claim and provided my information. After waiting for a few more weeks with no correspondence I called again and it was decided to deny my claim based off " lack of information '' although no one from the company called me to investigate properly. I then reopened the claim on XX/XX/year> and again waited many weeks with no correspondence from the company to investigate further. On XX/XX/XXXX, I called again and eventually spoke to a supervisor in the security operation who then told me my claim was being denied again because the card was " physically swiped in store. '' No one told me any of this information or shared their investigation with me until I called multiple times despite asking for them to call me and having them put that request in their notes. Even if a card was swiped in person, there are multiple ways to make fake credit cards and use real numbers. I am also the only legal authorized user of this card, so it would have been illegal for no one to check ID when using the credit card, there are also multiple cameras at self checkouts as well if that was how the purchases were made. The investigators looked into none of that and only denied my claim simply because the card was " physically used '' I even have evidence of being at the hospital for a fetal ultrasound on XX/XX/XXXX so there is no way I could have been physically present in XXXX places at once. Best Buys Credit Card XXXX 's lack of proper handling and investigation has lead me to fight for my credit for over 4 months. I have spoken to XXXX different people who have all given me different information, wrong information, wrong phone numbers, and wrong fax numbers. They have also been unwilling to provide me with detailed investigation notes, because they do not have them. They have looked at XXXX fact in this claim and refused to do any more investigating despite my information I have given. I am now in fear for my credit as they are still hitting me with late fees because they won't handle this in proper time or call me to ask any questions.
